LanguageData.VFET_FormCity.description: You have successfully completed all prospector research projects and have advanced to settler tech level. This will allow you to pick a Cornerstone - a powerful bonus that applies only to your civilization.
LanguageData.VFET_FormCity.label: settler tech level
LanguageData.VFET_FormCollective.description: You have successfully completed all settler research projects and have advanced to Vault-Tec tech level. This will allow you to pick a Cornerstone - a powerful bonus that applies only to your civilization.
LanguageData.VFET_FormCollective.label: Vault-Tec tech level
LanguageData.VFET_FormNexus.description: You have successfully completed all Vault-Tec research projects and have advanced to Pre-War tech level. This will allow you to pick a Cornerstone - a powerful bonus that applies only to your civilization.
LanguageData.VFET_FormNexus.label: pre-War tech level
LanguageData.VFET_FormTown.description: You have successfully completed all tribal research projects and have advanced to prospector tech level. This will allow you to pick a Cornerstone - a powerful bonus that applies only to your civilization.
LanguageData.VFET_FormTown.label: prospector tech level
LanguageData.VFET_FormTribe.description: You have successfully completed all survivalist research projects and have advanced to tribal tech level. This will allow you to pick a Cornerstone - a powerful bonus that applies only to your civilization.
LanguageData.VFET_FormTribe.label: tribal tech level
